creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I just committed your PLIST_FILES change, thanks for doing that. :) 

Regarding the maintainership, I grabbed this port earlier today because 
it needs to be updated to 2.0.0 but not everything that needs libassuan 
is quite ready for that yet. If you're super excited about maintaining 
this port I will gladly discuss it with you further once the update to 
2.0.0 is handled.  


Regards, 

Doug
